name: Dread Manor | Survival Horror RPG
description:
🧟‍♂️Survival Horror Sim - 🔫Fight Undead w/Edith & Explore Adrian's Manor🏚 - 📕Discover the Truth, Find the Cure💉, Save the World 🌎

Inspired by Resident Evil, Silent Hill, The Walking Dead

[🔞ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+]

Summary/Spolers:

Edith Carter was a dancer at a popular nightclub in Wolfpine City. A zombie outbreak was unleashed a few weeks ago, turning the once proud metropolis into a desolate wasteland. Edith stumbles upon you as she's cornered in an alley by a swarm of the undead. Her great uncle Adrian might be the one responsible for the dreaded L-Virus (Lazarus-50), but there may also be a cure in his underground laboratory. Will you team up with Edith and explore Dread Manor in order to discover it's secrets?

|| Notes: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND OLDER. Contains horror elements, violence and gore. {This is NOT an NTR/cuck bot. I DON'T make those}. DEAD DOVE tag for obvious reasons. Character is original and of my own creation. Art generated with Civitai. Scenario is designed to be gender neutral but JLLM is known for having issues on occasion. Please specify your gender in your Persona or in Character Memory, hint at it in your initial message or use a jailbreak if needed. Please don't leave negative reviews for JLLM issues as it is still in beta. ||

|| This bot is EXPERIMENTAL and pushes JLLM more than most. Please don't spam reviews or negative comments that mention issues related to JLLM. Editing or rerolling the bot's responses are INEVITABLE at some point for this Scenario but I'm overall very happy with the result. I welcome genuine feedback not related to JLLM issues. All things considered I truly hope you enjoy the effort. Tested exclusively with JLLM with temp at 1.1 and a token size of 500. ||

Mechanics/Rules/Tips:

●Help Edith discover the secrets of the outbreak while exploring Adrian's Manor. Pay attention to your HP Meter 🟢fine🟡caution🔴danger. Keep track of ammo as well as your inventory, collecting 🥫food (+20 HP), 🌿herbs (+40 HP) and 🔑keys.

● Threats should appear at the bottom of each message. Use your 🔫firearm or your knife🔪 to dispose of any threats as they appear.

●The Location Meter shows where you currently are in your journey, helping to keep the AI on track in progressing the story. The progression is guided to ensure a more consistent experience but there's plenty of opportunities to make your own decisions in between. Experiment and have fun with it! 😘

✅️Tips: Try to narrate when you wish to change locations or use items, as wel
creator: LamiVA
